title: Henriettea prancei
taxonomy: Henriettea prancei is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is native to Brazil and is classified as a member of the genus Henriettea. Henriettea prancei is further classified as a species of shrub or small tree. The plant is characterized by its bright green leaves and showy white or pink flowers. Within the family Melastomataceae, Henriettea prancei is part of the order Myrtales.

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various conditions such as wound healing, fever, and respiratory issues.
